attempts.strategy: Convert opaque stub to def aliasing Mathlib's finite-presentation predicate; relies on X.Modules = SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf definitionally
attempts.code_tried: def IsLFP {X : Scheme.{u}} (M : X.Modules) : Prop := SheafOfModules.IsFinitePresentation M
attempts.insight: M : X.Modules reduces to SheafOfModules; direct re-export typechecks, axiom-clean {propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound}

attempts.strategy: Define free as existence of an index Λ and an iso to the Mathlib free sheaf of modules
attempts.code_tried: def IsFreeMod {X : Scheme.{u}} (J : X.Modules) : Prop := ∃ (Λ : Type u), Nonempty (J ≅ SheafOfModules.free (R := X.ringCatSheaf) Λ)
attempts.insight: Does NOT imply IsLFP (free on arbitrary Λ need not be finitely presented). Genuine project def, not a pure alias.

next_steps: Real conclusion now; gates exists_free_resolution_step witness ⟨Λ,⟨iso⟩⟩.
